constraint.description: Passive panel views name their fixed shell surface.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType {viewBucket: 'VIEW'}) WHERE NOT type.fqn CONTAINS '$' AND NOT ( (type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.slotcontent\\..*' AND type.name ENDS WITH 'View') OR (type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.leftbartabs\\.[^.]+\\..*' AND (type.name ENDS WITH 'ControlsView' OR type.name ENDS WITH 'MainView' OR type.name ENDS WITH 'StateView')) OR (type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.dropdowns\\.[^.]+\\..*' AND type.name ENDS WITH 'TopBarView') OR (type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.statetabs\\.[^.]+\\..*' AND type.name ENDS WITH 'StateView') ) RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, 'area-specific passive view suffix: leftbartabs use *ControlsView/*MainView/*StateView, dropdowns use *TopBarView, statetabs use *StateView, slotcontent including slotcontent/primitives uses *View' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Passive view names must identify the shell surface they render.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Each passive view source file owns exactly one top-level panel fragment.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType {viewBucket: 'VIEW'}) WHERE NOT type.fqn CONTAINS '$' WITH type.relativePath AS source, collect(DISTINCT type.name) AS typeNames WHERE size(typeNames) <> 1 RETURN source AS Source, 'exactly one top-level passive panel view type' AS ExpectedDirection, reduce(actual = '', typeName IN typeNames | CASE WHEN actual = '' THEN typeName ELSE actual + ', ' + typeName END) AS ActualDirection, 'A passive view file must define exactly one panel fragment.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Passive panel views depend only on their allowed co-located model surface and passive views.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType) WITH source, target, split(source.fqn, '.') AS sourceSegments, split(target.fqn, '.') AS targetSegments WHERE source.viewBucket = 'VIEW' AND NOT ( ( target.viewBucket = 'MODEL' AND ( ( size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND size(targetSegments) >= 4 AND sourceSegments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND targetSegments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceSegments[2] = targetSegments[2] AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] ) OR ( size(sourceSegments) >= 5 AND size(targetSegments) >= 5 AND sourceSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND targetSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] AND sourceSegments[4] = targetSegments[4] ) ) ) OR ( target.viewBucket = 'VIEW_INPUT_EVENT' AND ( ( size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND size(targetSegments) >= 4 AND sourceSegments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND targetSegments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceSegments[2] = targetSegments[2] AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] ) OR ( size(sourceSegments) >= 5 AND size(targetSegments) >= 5 AND sourceSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND targetSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] AND sourceSegments[4] = targetSegments[4] ) ) ) OR ( target.viewBucket = 'VIEW' AND ( ( size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND size(targetSegments) >= 4 AND sourceSegments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND targetSegments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceSegments[2] = targetSegments[2] AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] ) OR ( size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND sourceSegments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND size(targetSegments) >= 5 AND targetSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' ) OR ( size(sourceSegments) >= 5 AND size(targetSegments) >= 5 AND sourceSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND targetSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND ( ( sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] AND sourceSegments[4] = targetSegments[4] ) OR targetSegments[3] = 'primitives' ) ) ) ) ) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, 'same-root model/view/input-event surfaces or passive reusable slotcontent only' AS ExpectedDirection, target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Passive views may depend only on co-located passive-view surfaces and the closed reusable slotcontent three-role seam.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, ActualDirection
